message:
fix(service): release reserved buffer slot when poll_ready detects closure

When a Buffer handle has a reserved capacity slot and poll_ready()
discovers the buffer has been closed, the reserved slot was leaked —
pending count stayed elevated, preventing other handles from observing
accurate capacity. Now poll_ready() explicitly releases the reservation
via release_capacity_claim() before returning BufferError::Closed.

New test poll_ready_after_close_releases_reserved_slot verifies that
both the closing handle and a sibling clone see pending count drop to
zero after closure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
